---
title: "Research"
listing:
    - id: publications
      contents: 
        - publications/*.yml
      type: custom
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      template: publications.ejs
    - id: grants
      contents: 
        - grants/*.yml
      type: custom
      sort:
        - "date desc"
      page-size: 100
      categories: false
      template: grants.ejs
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
css: research.css
---

## Selected Publications
::: {#publications}
:::

## Grants
::: {#grants}
:::
